ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: obsidian-hide-folders
ast.target: obsidian-hide-folders

ast.name: innerText
ast.source: Experimental & Unstable Settings
ast.target: 实验性与不稳定设置

ast.name: outerHTML
log
ast.source: loading plugin hide-folders
ast.target: 正在加载插件 hide-folders

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: The names of the folders to hide, one per line. Either exact folder-names, startsWith::FOLDERPREFIX, or endsWith::FOLDERSUFFIX
ast.target: 要隐藏的文件夹名称，每行一个。可以是精确的文件夹名称、startsWith::FOLDERPREFIX 或 endsWith::FOLDERSUFFIX

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enabled, 'SOMEFOLDER', 'someFolder', or 'sOmeFoldEr' will all be treated the same and matched.
ast.target: 启用后，'SOMEFOLDER'、'someFolder' 或 'sOmeFoldEr' 将被视为相同并匹配。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If the configured folders should be hidden or not
ast.target: 已配置的文件夹是否应隐藏

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Excluded files will be hidden in Search, Graph View, and Unlinked Mentions, less noticeable in Quick Switcher and link suggestions.
ast.target: 排除的文件将在搜索、图谱视图和未链接提及中隐藏，在快速切换器和链接建议中不那么显眼。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If enable there will be no bottom-bar indicator-text telling you if this plugin is active.
ast.target: 启用后将不会有底部栏指示文本告知此插件是否处于活动状态。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: [WARNING: UNSTABLE] Also hide hidden folders in the https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer plugin. Not affiliated with quick-explorer's author.
ast.target: [警告：不稳定] 同时在 https://github.com/pjeby/quick-explorer 插件中隐藏已隐藏的文件夹。与 quick-explorer 的作者无关联。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Report Issues or Ideas, see the Source Code and Contribute.
ast.target: 报告问题或想法，查看源代码并参与贡献。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: If you like this open-source plugin, consider a small tip to support my unpaid work.
ast.target: 如果你喜欢这个开源插件，可考虑小额打赏以支持我无偿的工作。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Folders to hide
ast.target: 要隐藏的文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Ignore Upper/lowercase
ast.target: 忽略大小写

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide folders
ast.target: 隐藏文件夹

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Add Hidden Folders to Obsidian Exclusion-List
ast.target: 将隐藏文件夹添加到 Obsidian 排除列表

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Hide bottom status-bar "Folders are Hidden" indicator
ast.target: 隐藏底部状态栏“文件夹已隐藏”指示器

ast.name: setName
ast.source: [EXPERIMENTAL] Compatibility: quick-explorer by pjeby
ast.target: [实验性] 兼容性：pjeby 的 quick-explorer

ast.name: setPlaceholder
ast.source:
attachments
endsWith::_attachments
ast.target:
附件
endsWith::_attachments

ast.name: name
ast.source: Toggle visibility of hidden folders
ast.target: 切换隐藏文件夹的可见性
